name: MISRA C: Required Violation Has Deviation
description: Any violation of a Required guideline is covered by an approved deviation.
rationale: MISRA Compliance:2020: Required guidelines should be followed, but documented and approved deviations are allowed where justified.

examples.fails: the required compliance artifact/step is absent

source: MISRA Compliance:2020 — Achieving compliance with MISRA Coding Guidelines, applied to MISRA C:2012. https://misra.org.uk/
